structured_variables.evidence_summary: Five near-identical cash-outs of about BDT 1,000 occurred within 12 minutes.
structured_variables.uncertainty_statement: This pattern can also arise from ordinary event-driven demand.

plausible_benign_explanation: This may reflect normal pre-Eid demand from a small group of regular customers.
recommended_next_step: Review the listed synthetic transactions before coordinating any operational follow-up.
